titleStmt.title: SII 8.521: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 521. (A.R. No. 222 of 1903). ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kovirājake
caripanma ṟku yāṇṭu 4Āvatu
tiruveṅkaṭakkoṭṭattuc cilai
nāṭṭut tiruviṟperumpeṭṭu
paraśurāmīśvara ttup perumā
ṉaṭikaḷukkut tiruvussa hañce
yya maturān=ta kaṉ kaṇṭarāti
ttar Eḻun=ta ruḷuvitta kūttappe
rumāḷukkut tiruvamirtukkum O
ru ṉantāviḷakkum muṉṟu te
cakālattukkum ṉeyyamutu
kkum muṉṟu sandhi kkun tayiramutu
kkum muṉṟu sandhi kkuṅ kaṟiyamutuk
kum muṉṟu sandhi kkuṅ ku
mmāyaamutukkum muṉṟu
sandhi kkum Aṭaikkāyamutukku
m Ivvūr melaikkaḻaṉiyil bra r
hma ṇarpakkal vilaikuṭuttu
vilaikkuk koṇṭa bhūmi puḷikai
yoṭṭaic ceṟukkaḷil Araiyum
koṇṭikāvati yericceṟukkaḷil
Oṉṟaraiyum kaṭikaikkaḷattu patiṉa
ṟucāṇkolāl Añpatukuḻiko
ṇṭatu Orumāvāka Āyiraṅkuḻiko
ṇṭatu Oru paṭṭiyāka vilaikuṭu
ttuk koṇṭa ṉilam Iraṇṭu pa
ṭṭiyilum pon=ta bhoga m
ṉellu ṉāṉūṟṟu Eḻupattue
ḻu kāṭi ṉāṉāḻi Iṉṉāṉūṟṟu Eḻu
pattueḻukāṭi ṉāṉāḻi ṉellu
ṅ koṇṭu nivan=ta ñceytapari
cāvatu . tiruvamirtarici Oru sandhi kku
ṉāṉāḻippaṭi kuttalariciyāka mu
ṉṟu sandhi kkuṅ kuttalarici panṉi
ruṉāḻi kuttalariciyāl Añci
raṇṭuvaṇṇam Oru ṉāḷaikku va
n=ta ṉellu Eḻutūm piruṉāḻi
yum Oru ṉan=tā viḷakkukkum
muṉṟu sandhi kkum Amutukku
muḻākku ṉeykkum Āka

Oru ṉāḷaikku ṉey ṉāḻi
kku nellu ṉāṟṟūmpum
munṟu sandhi kkum tayiramutu
muṉṉāḻikku ṉellu muṉ
ṉāḻiyum muṉṟu sandhi kku
m kummāyaamutukkuc
ciṟupayaṟṟuparuppu ṉāḻikku
ṉellu Iruṉāḻiyum munṟu
sandhi kkum porikkaṟi Oṉṟu
m puḻukkukkaṟi Oṉṟum Āka
k kaṟiyamutu Iraṇṭukku Oruṉā
ḷaikku ṉellu ṉāḻiyum mun
ṟu sandhi kkum Aṭaikkā
yamutu poḻ tiraṇṭu pā
kkum Ilai ṉālumāka Oru ṉāḷaik
kup pākku Āṟum Ilai panṉi
raṇṭukkum ṉellu ṉica
tam ṉāḻiyum Āka Oru ṉāḷai
kku ṉellu Orukāṭi muttū
m poruṉāḻiyāka Orāṇ
ṭu muṉṉūṟ ṟaṟupatu nāḷai
kku nivan=ta ñceyta nellu
ṉāṉūṟṟu Eḻupattuēḻu kā
ṭi ṉānāḻi Iṉṉellu ṉā
ṉūṟ ṟeḻupatteḻu kāṭi ṉā
nāḻi ṉellum maturān=ta ka
ṉ kaṇṭarātittar tiruveṅka
ṭakkoṭṭattuc cilaiṉāṭ
ṭut tiruviṟperumpeṭṭup
paraśurāmīśva rattuppe
rumāṉaṭikaḷ tiruvussa hat
tukku maturān=ta kaṉ kaṇṭarā
tittar Eḻun=ta ruḷuvitta kū
ttapperumāḷukku Itte
var bhoga ṅ kaikkoṇ
ṭu Iṉṉivantappaṭi Oṉṟu muṭṭāmey celuttuvomāṉom tiruviṟperumpeṭṭuk kāṇiyuṭaiya śi
vabrāhma ṇarom Iṉṉivan=ta ppaṭiyil leteṉu moṉṟu muṭṭāmey celuttuvatākavum muṭṭil tiruvāṇai māṟupaṭuvo
māṉon tiruviṟperumpeṭṭuk kāṇiyuṭaiya śivabrāhmaṇa- rom . I[ bhū mi] Iraṇṭu paṭṭi ṉilat
tālum Ācuvippe ṟeṉṟum ṉirvilai yeṉṟum koḷḷappeṟātatākavum . Ipparicu Oṭṭikkuṭutto
m tiruviṟperumpeṭṭu sabhai- yom [*] Itu panmā heśvara rakṣai . tiruviṟperumpeṭṭusabhai yom
Iṉṉilam Iraṇṭu paṭ
ṭi ṉilamum Oṟṟi vaikkiṟa
tiruvāṇai Iṟai taṇ
ṭappaṭuvomāṉom
Ivviraṇṭu paṭṭi ṉilattu
kkum poṉkoṇṭu Iṟai
Iḻiccikkuṭuttom sabhai yom .
Digital edition of SII 8.521 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
